full_text:
Shen You (Zizheng) 沈友 (子正)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shen You (沈友), styledZizheng (子正). Compiled commentary on art of war, alienated from Sun Quan who later killed him. Shen You was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Shen You lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
